subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-01-22 in London
subcodes.first_line: Instruct the friends to read and disseminate these Tablets. How impressive are the commentaries which the Muslims of former times wrote concerning these verses: 'The Romans have been defeated…'
subcodes.first_line_orig: بنویسید این الواح مبارکه را بخوانند و نشر دهند سابق مسلمین در تفسیر آلم غلبت الرّوم
